text: Effective team management requires several key skills. First, clear communication is essential. You should explain tasks and goals directly to avoid confusion. Next, good delegation means trusting team members with responsibilities that match their strengths. Regular, constructive feedback helps people improve and feel valued. To keep motivation high, recognise achievements and create a positive work environment. Finally, conflict resolution is crucial. When disagreements arise, listen to both sides calmly and seek a fair solution. By balancing these elements, you can lead a productive, cohesive team where everyone feels respected and engaged.
